title: Send intro message to IRC and update thread

log.context: Send intro message to IRC and update thread

The IRC bridge doesn't expose a readable message log endpoint — the `/say` and `/status` routes work, but there's no `/messages`, `/history`, `/recent`, `/log`, or `/chat` endpoint. The bridge is likely pushing incoming IRC messages directly to Discord via inject (that's what the irc-bridge user posts would be), rather than buffering them for polling.
